User.title: User
User.description: User profile and AI customization settings

uid.description: The unique user ID from Firebase Auth

coachPersona.description: The selected AI coach style (e.g. gentle, drill-sergeant, analytical, stoic)

burnoutRisk.description: The current burnout state predicted by AI

burnoutAdvice.description: Burnout mitigation advice from the coach

Task.title: Task
Task.description: A commitment, assignment, or task created by the user with active AI analysis

userId.description: ID of the user who owns the task

deadline.description: ISO date-time string representing the deadline

estimatedHours.description: Estimated hours to complete the task

importanceLevel.description: The subjective importance of this task

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was completed

failureProbability.description: AI predicted probability of missing the deadline (0-100)

failureReasons.description: AI generated reasons why this deadline is at risk

panicScore.description: AI predicted anxiety/panic score for this task (0-100)

rescuePlan.description: AI generated micro-completion timeline or survival guide

consequences.description: AI simulated consequences of skipping this commitment

lastAnalyzedAt.description: Timestamp when AI last analyzed this task

users/{userId}/tasks/{taskId}.description: Tasks subcollection containing tasks for a specific user
